title: Pentagon carve-out for Anthropic just reduces a live Palantir overhang
summary: Reuters reported the Pentagon told senior leaders that Anthropic tools may keep running beyond the previously announced six-month phase-out if they are deemed critical to national security. Full Reuters text was not directly accessible in this run, but the source quality is high and the signal is clear: the Defense Department is leaving itself room to keep important Anthropic-linked workflows alive instead of forcing a hard cutoff.
